name: threat-detection-model-deeplearning
description: Task runner for Threat Detection Deep Learning project — conda env + uv package manager

scripts.setup-initial: conda create --prefix $HOME/$npm_package_config_venv_path python=$npm_package_config_python_version -y && conda run --prefix $HOME/$npm_package_config_venv_path pip install uv && conda run --prefix $HOME/$npm_package_config_venv_path uv pip install . && echo '' && echo '=====================================' && echo '  Setup complete!' && echo '  Env: ~/$npm_package_config_venv_path' && echo '  Activate: conda activate $HOME/$npm_package_config_venv_path' && echo '====================================='
scripts.setup-venv-daily: conda run --prefix $HOME/$npm_package_config_venv_path python --version && conda run --prefix $HOME/$npm_package_config_venv_path uv pip install . && (grep -q 'alias pytorch_project_tdm=' ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null || printf '\nalias pytorch_project_tdm="conda activate %s"\n' "$HOME/$npm_package_config_venv_path" >> ~/.zshrc) && echo '' && echo '=====================================' && echo '  Env ready!' && echo '  Run: source ~/.zshrc  (first time only)' && echo '  Then: pytorch_project_tdm' && echo '====================================='
